pattern: A greedy single pass keeps each character only while it would not create a third consecutive equal letter.
hints: You only ever need to delete characters from runs of three or more identical letters.
Build the result one character at a time, tracking the last two appended characters.
Append the current character unless the previous two already equal it; that keeps every run capped at length two and is optimal.

edge_inputs.description: trim a triple down to a double
exactly two in a row stays
long single run collapses to two

stress.description: long string drawn from a tiny alphabet so long runs appear
